center.name: 新西蘭國家廣播電台
center.summary: 新西蘭國家廣播電台是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括绿头鸭，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Fish & Wildlife Service|language=en}} but also regularly strays into Central America and the Caribbean between September and May. A drake later named "Trevor" attracted media attention in 2018 when it turned up on the island of Niue, an atypical location for mallards. The mallard inhabits a wide range of habitats and climates, from the Arctic tundra to subtropical regions.{{Cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=xNQgAQAAIAAJ|title=People and Wildlife in Northern North America: Essays in Honor of R
